sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, name VARCHAR(50), value INT);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'first', NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (2, 'second', 20);
SELECT id, coalesce(value, 0) AS coalesced_value FROM test_table WHERE name = 'first';
UPDATE test_table SET value = coalesce(value, 10) WHERE id = 2;
